india_trends.title: LIC board approves issuance of bonus equity shares in 1:1 ratio. Check details
india_trends.summary: The board of LIC approved a 1:1 bonus share issuance, subject to shareholder approval. The move, aimed at rewarding its 20.90 lakh retail shareholders, will increase paid-up equity capital significantly while maintaining financial parameters.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Chevron, Shell to sign agreements for oil, gas areas in Venezuela, sources say
india_trends.summary: Chevron is set to sign agreements to return a gas field in Venezuela and expand operations in the Orinoco heavy crude belt, while Shell prepares to operate the Loran gas field. The deals reflect Venezuela’s push to attract foreign energy investment following major hydrocarbon law reforms and sanctio

india_trends.title: US airline stocks fall up to 3% as crude surges on renewed West Asia conflict; Delta, United, American trade in red
india_trends.summary: US airline stocks plunged on Monday as crude oil prices soared after failed peace talks between Iran and the US. Delta Air Lines shares dropped 3.2%, while other major airlines also saw declines, highlighting the aviation industry's vulnerability to rising fuel costs amid escalating tensions.

india_trends.title: US IPO hopefuls forge ahead with listing plans amid market swings
india_trends.summary: Companies across sectors have resumed IPO roadshows despite Middle East tensions, signalling pent-up demand in the pipeline. Analysts expect listings to pick up if volatility eases, with improving valuations and lower VIX supporting sentiment. 2026 is still seen as a strong year for IPOs despite rec

india_trends.title: LIC board approves 1-for-1 bonus issue
india_trends.summary: The bonus issue involves the creation of over 632 crore shares, amounting to approximately ₹6,325 crore, through the capitalisation of reserves, surplus available as of December 31, 2025.

india_trends.title: CoreWeave shares jump 12% on deal with Anthropic; stock surges 40% in unbeaten five-session rally
india_trends.summary: CoreWeave shares surged after a multi-year deal with Anthropic to power Claude AI models, extending a five-session rally. The agreement boosts its position in AI infrastructure as demand for large-scale compute accelerates globally.

india_trends.title: J.P.Morgan, Morgan Stanley urge buying the dip as US earnings stay resilient
india_trends.summary: Wall Street brokerages J.P. Morgan and Morgan Stanley see recent market weakness as a buying opportunity, backed by resilient earnings growth. Despite Middle East tensions, the S&P 500 has rebounded from March lows, with strategists viewing the pullback as a correction rather than a prolonged do

india_trends.title: Global downgrades unwind India’s premium, cap market upside
india_trends.summary: Target cuts and earnings downgrades drive a reset in positioning; recovery hinges on macro stability and visibility on growth

india_trends.title: LIC announces 1:1 bonus issue, first since listing. Check details
india_trends.summary: State-owned insurer LIC's board has approved a 1:1 bonus share issue, granting one additional share for every share held on the record date. This move will be funded by capitalizing Rs 6,325 crore from reserves by December 2025 and is expected to be completed within two months of the board's approva

india_trends.title: Goldman sets tone for Q1 earnings season. How markets react is key.
india_trends.summary: Are stocks priced to perfection? The next few weeks will reveal a lot as to where markets are headed.

india_trends.title: Goldman Sachs shares fall 5% despite 19% YoY earnings growth amid Wall Street gloom
india_trends.summary: Goldman Sachs shares dropped nearly 5% despite strong Q1 results, as geopolitical tensions and market volatility weighed on sentiment. Revenue, profit, and trading performance improved year-on-year, but broader uncertainty pressured the stock.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold slips $161/oz; silver down $4/oz on renewed US-Iran tensions
india_trends.summary: Precious metals experienced significant losses on 13 April due to renewed Middle East tensions following the failure of US-Iran peace talks. Gold futures fell sharply, while silver also declined.

india_trends.title: Patanjali Foods board to meet on April 21 to consider second interim dividend, Q4 earnings
india_trends.summary: Patanjali Foods will consider a second interim dividend for FY26 on April 21, alongside March quarter results. The stock remains under pressure, trading below key averages and down sharply over the past year.

india_trends.title: Net sales of non-financial private companies rise 11.4% in FY25: RBI data
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank's recent statistics reveal that net sales for non-financial private firms surged by 11.4 percent in 2024-25. india_trends.title: India imposes import curbs on herbicide Glufosinate & salts
india_trends.summary: New Delhi has placed restrictions on Glufosinate and its salts imports for six months. This herbicide, crucial for agriculture, will face curbs if its combined cost, insurance, freight, and anti-dumping duty fall below Rs 1,154 per kilogram.
